notes: v2.5.9 — CATIA remote viewing overhaul: much lower latency and true 60 fps, a cleaner single-window view with Disconnect/Esc as a reliable exit, no more frozen or hijacked screens, reliable multi-key input, and smarter local-vs-remote routing. New built-in Wiki: file/image attachments with version history and restore, backlinks and a visual explorer, shareable page links, and safe (soft) deletes restricted to admins or the author. RP Queue deletes now stay deleted. Plus reliability and purchasing/vendor data cleanups.
